name: Santa Fe Pumpkin Soup:
recipeIngredient: 32 ounces Solid pack pumpkin (not pie filling!)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, sauté garlic in hot oil until lightly golden brown.
2. Add peppers and continue sautéing for an additional 2 minutes.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients (except sour cream and cilantro).
4. Cook until heated through.
5. Serve each bowl of soup topped with a dollop of sour cream and garnished with cilantro leaves.
6. Makes 8 cups of soup.
Note: You may substitute one medium red bell pepper, charred over a gas flame, peeled, seeded, and minced.
